commit_scope: Carry host-io into the fkwu native lane: implement fs_list (the universal directory-list op) on the emitted universal kernel so the self-healing memory loop runs natively, not only on the Go bootstrap kernel. fs_list gets a flattener op row (op 132, arity 1, effectful), an opendir/readdir walker arm in the fkwu emitted-C (name-sorted for cross-kernel parity), and a unary serializer row in fkc-flat (the same as_nid:null serializer-class fix the trivial-typed-leaf precedent records, this time for tag 132). rag-heal.fk is rewritten onto the UNIVERSAL host-io ops (read_file 63 / write_file_text 104 / fs_list 132) so the enumerate->key->embed->write loop runs on the Go kernel AND the fkwu native exe. The heal lane uses the one universal door (fs_list); there was no Go-kernel-specific host-list to remove (the design went straight to the universal op, not a walker-only detour). This is the honest floor: fs_list crosses four-way + fkwu (deterministic by membership), and the full heal loop's host-io primitives compose and run on the fkwu native binary; host-io OUTPUT stays outside the four-way output floor by the kernel's own design (a directory's contents differ by environment).

standard_receipt.claim: Directory enumeration (fs_list) is a universal Form host-io op the fkwu emitted-C carries, four-way + fkwu; the self-healing memory loop's host-io (enumerate/read/write) runs on the fkwu native exe, not only the Go kernel.
standard_receipt.body: yes - fs_list is a flattener op (132) + an fkwu emitted-C opendir/readdir arm + an fkc-flat unary serializer row; rag-heal.fk composes fs_list/read_file/write_file_text into the enumerate->key->embed->write loop.
standard_receipt.c_bootstrap: pending - the fkwu binary is emitted by the Go walker (fkc-emit-universal) and compiled by clang; not yet a C-bootstrap-emitted form-cli.
standard_receipt.toolchain_free: pending - the four-way witness runs via validate.sh (bash) with the Go/Rust/TS walkers present; no go/rust/clang/bash/python-free run is observed yet.

platforms.mac: observed (four-way floor incl. fkwu) - fs-list-band crosses Go=Rust=TS=fkwu = 3 on this Apple metal via validate.sh; the enumerate->read->write loop witnessed on the fkwu native exe (36-byte index written, .txt excluded). toolchain-free + c-bootstrap PENDING.
platforms.windows: pending - not run this session; fs_list uses dirent (POSIX) with a documented Windows shim path in fourth-arm.sh, not yet observed on windows-latest.
platforms.android: pending - no device this session; not faked.

standard_receipt.honest_floor: fs_list crosses FOUR-WAY (Go=Rust=TS=fkwu = 3, 'fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way (fkwu + pre-flattened tables)', 0 divergent) on mac via validate.sh. That is the four-way floor - the LESSER rung - observed via bash-driven validate.sh with the Go/Rust/TS walkers present plus the fkwu pre-flattened table + native exe. It is NOT the standard receipt: a Go-emitted+clang-compiled fkwu is not c-bootstrap, bash-driven validate.sh is not toolchain-free. The full bar is pending on every platform.

evidence_refs: MAC four-way OBSERVED incl. fkwu on this Apple metal via validate.sh (Go/Rust/TS walkers + fkwu pre-flattened table + native exe, NOT c-bootstrap, NOT toolchain-free): ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/tests/fs-list-band.fk -> 'core.fk+fs-list-band.fk -> 3' + 'fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way (fkwu + pre-flattened tables)' + '1 ok, 0 divergent - kernels agree on every sample.'

FKWU native-exe direct witness of fs_list: a minimal (len (fs_list "form-stdlib")) table run on the freshly emitted+compiled fkwu binary returned 598 (the live entry count); the membership band returned 3; opendir/readdir/count probe returned 500598 (598 entries). The root-cause of the initial fkwu=0 was the cons-loop running before fk_arena() initialized fk_cap, so the heap-overflow guard (fk_hp+1 >= fk_cap) fired immediately and returned nil; adding 'if (fk_cap == 0) { fk_arena(); }' before the cons loop (as fk_cons_val does) fixed it.

FKWU native-exe witness of the rag-heal enumerate->read->write loop: an inline band over /tmp/rhbody (a.fk, b.fk, skip.txt) flattened to a table and run on the fkwu binary enumerated via fs_list, filtered to .fk (skip.txt excluded), read both files via read_file, concatenated, wrote via write_file_text, and read back 36 bytes - the exact two .fk bodies. The whole host-io loop runs on the fkwu native exe.

SERIALIZER PRECEDENT: the as_nid:null crash on adding tag 132 is the SAME class as the trivial-typed-leaf precedent in fourth-arm-bands.txt (tags 112/113 needed unary serializer rows beside tag 43, else they fell to the binary fallback and read a missing second child). Fixed by adding the unary fkc-flat row for 132.

OPCODE COLLISION root-caused: 112 (the first choice) was already a live fk_walk dispatch arm (intern_trivial_bool); fs_list moved to a free opcode 132 (verified free by enumerating all walker tags + flatten opcodes).

WINDOWS / ANDROID PENDING: not run this session; not faked. fs_list uses <dirent.h> guarded by __has_include; the Windows carrier path in scripts/fourth-arm.sh would need a readdir shim, not yet observed.

C-BOOTSTRAP / TOOLCHAIN-FREE PENDING on all platforms: per docs/coherence-substrate/standard-receipt.form, four-way-in-CI is NOT the platform receipt, a Go-emitted+clang-compiled fkwu is NOT c-bootstrap, and bash-driven validate.sh is NOT toolchain-free.

fkwu native-exe direct: (len (fs_list "form-stdlib")) -> 598; fs-list membership band -> 3
fkwu native-exe direct: rag-heal enumerate->read->write loop over /tmp/rhbody -> 36 bytes written (skip.txt excluded), index round-tripped

ci_validation.notes: Four-way fs-list band observed locally on mac; CI (windows-floor) will run the band on push. Not yet observed on windows-latest this session.

deploy_validation.notes: fkwu is a local kernel artifact; this work is the host-io op + heal-loop runtime, not a public HTTP change. No deploy.

phase_gate.reason: Honest floor only: fs_list four-way + fkwu observed on mac via validate.sh; the rag-heal host-io loop runs on the fkwu native exe (mac). windows/android pending; the c-bootstrap toolchain-free form-cli rung is pending on every platform.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Directory enumeration is now a universal Form host-io op the fkwu emitted-C carries (fs_list, op 132), four-way + fkwu. The self-healing memory loop (rag-heal.fk) is rewritten onto universal host-io (read_file/write_file_text/fs_list) and its enumerate->read->write loop runs on the fkwu native exe, not only the Go bootstrap kernel - closing the directory-list standing wall named in the spec. The heal lane uses the one universal door (fs_list); there was no Go-kernel-specific host-list to remove.
public_endpoints: local form-cli / fkwu kernel only - no public coherencycoin endpoint; band at form/form-stdlib/tests/fs-list-band.fk, op in form/form-stdlib/form-flatten.fk + form/form-stdlib/hati-os-kernel-emit.fk
